item.title: Creating a Solid Foundation for a New House Build
item.description: A look at the foundation work for a new house build, focusing on the building process and the steps that help set the project up for the next phase. What comes after the foundation is in place?

media:content.media:title: Creating a Solid Foundation for a New House Build
media:content.media:description: A look at the foundation work for a new house build, focusing on the building process and the steps that help set the project up for the next phase. What comes after the foundation is in place?

item.title: Building a Mountain Home Part 5: Concrete Day
item.description: Part 5 of the mountain home build focuses on concrete day and the work that goes into it. A practical look at the building process, tools, and site progress on this project. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Building a Mountain Home Part 5: Concrete Day
media:content.media:description: Part 5 of the mountain home build focuses on concrete day and the work that goes into it. A practical look at the building process, tools, and site progress on this project. What comes next?

item.title: How To Pour Concrete Correctly
item.description: A practical look at pouring concrete the right way, with a focus on the process, tools, and jobsite steps that help support a solid finish. What matters most when getting concrete placed and finished?

media:content.media:title: How To Pour Concrete Correctly
media:content.media:description: A practical look at pouring concrete the right way, with a focus on the process, tools, and jobsite steps that help support a solid finish. What matters most when getting concrete placed and finished?

item.title: Let the Hammer Championships Begin
item.description: A look at skilled hammer work in a hands-on building challenge, highlighting technique, precision, and tool control in practical construction tasks. From striking accuracy to material handling, this showcase focuses on craftsmanship in action. What part of the technique stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Let the Hammer Championships Begin
media:content.media:description: A look at skilled hammer work in a hands-on building challenge, highlighting technique, precision, and tool control in practical construction tasks. From striking accuracy to material handling, this showcase focuses on craftsmanship in action. What part of the technique stands out most?

item.title: The Secret To Building Stairs
item.description: A clear look at the process and planning behind building stairs, focusing on measurement accuracy, structure, and step alignment. The showcase highlights how proper technique ensures safety and consistency in construction. What part of stair building do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: The Secret To Building Stairs
media:content.media:description: A clear look at the process and planning behind building stairs, focusing on measurement accuracy, structure, and step alignment. The showcase highlights how proper technique ensures safety and consistency in construction. What part of stair building do you find most interesting?

item.title: Building Something Special, One Episode at a Time
item.description: A look at the ongoing building process, with each episode adding another step in the project. Focused on hands-on work, craftsmanship, and steady progress on the job site. What comes next?

item.title: Genius Tool for Easier Building Work
item.description: An overview of a practical building tool designed to simplify construction work and improve efficiency on-site. The focus is on usability, design improvements, and how it supports faster and more accurate results. Which feature would be most useful in real work?

item.title: Why a Speed Square Should Be Your Go-To Tool
item.description: A speed square is a simple, reliable tool for layout, marking, and quick checks on the job site. This video looks at why it belongs in a builder’s kit and how it supports accurate work. Do you keep

item.title: Carpentry 101: Tools, Tips & Method
item.description: A practical look at carpentry basics, covering the tools, tips, and method used on the job. Focused on building process, craftsmanship, and steady progress. What tools do you rely on most?

item.title: How To Build a Valley Intersection Between 2 Rooflines
item.description: A practical look at building a valley intersection between two rooflines, with a focus on layout, framing, tools, and the step-by-step process. How is the intersection handled on your projects?

item.title: Most Underappreciated Job on Site
item.description: A look at one of the most underappreciated jobs on a construction site, with focus on the work, tools, and day-to-day process. What role do you think keeps the project moving most?
